title: State/Local Government IT Professional Services RFP
hard_disqualifiers: LATE PROPOSALS WILL NOT BE ACCEPTED. Proposals delivered after the said deadline will not be accepted.
Failure to complete and submit the required documents and attachments may result in your proposal being deemed non-responsive.
Failure to complete and submit the DBE forms according to the above instructions will render your bid non-responsive.
Fax submission will not be acceptable.
This form [Cover Sheet] must be completed in its entirety. Deviations and failure to complete and sign this form will deem your proposal non-responsive.
notes: Static snapshot of a real proposal-ops run. Agency, location, and proprietary identifiers redacted. Download the full system from GitHub to run against your own RFP.
